rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into component type or implementation scopes, matching the visibility of ports and connections in the AADL model.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope boundaries: component type annexes must use only directly visible ports; implementation annexes may bind subcomponent ports.
Only reference identifiers explicitly declared as AADL features, subcomponents, or connections—never AADL properties or unit tokens.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `eq` to declare intermediate boolean or numeric helpers for complex conditions.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent port paths in component type annexes.
